title: leptosiphonium stricklandii
intro: Leptosiphonium stricklandii, also known as the Strickland's shield, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to Papua New Guinea and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and treating skin conditions. Leptosiphonium stricklandii is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use.
